name: Iris
description: Monitors Florida OIR continuously. Alerts you the moment a material change affects your line of business. No portal hunting. No missed bulletins.

name: TDD Practice Team
description: Pre-LOI screening to IC-ready output in 72 hours. Works alongside your practitioners. Calibrates to your firm's methodology.

name: Renew
description: Monitors your policy book, identifies renewal risk 90 days out, and manages outreach automatically.

name: Dispatch
description: Answers every inbound call, books jobs, manages the schedule, and sends confirmations — including the calls that come in at 2am.

name: Scout
description: Responds to portal enquiries within 60 seconds, qualifies buyers, and books showings directly into your calendar.

name: Comply
description: Continuously monitors regulatory feeds across your jurisdictions and flags compliance obligations before they become exposure.

name: Brief
description: Converts intake calls and intake forms into structured, actionable client briefs — ready for your team to execute against.

name: File
description: Classifies, names, and routes inbound documents into the right folders with the right metadata. Zero manual filing.

name: Counsel
description: Works alongside your legal team — researching precedent, summarising case law, and drafting first-pass memos under practitioner direction.

name: Accord
description: Reads contracts against your standard positions, flags deviations, and produces a redline summary — ready for partner review.

name: Ledger
description: Reconciles accounts, flags discrepancies, and produces period-end summaries — working under your finance team's oversight.

name: Publish
description: Pulls SEMrush data, identifies keyword gaps, produces a monthly content calendar with fully briefed articles.
